overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a waterfront shanty town. The scene transitions from a narrow corrugated metal alley to an open area with views of a futuristic neon-lit city skyline, then into a dilapidated interior space. The lighting is warm morning sun with long shadows cast across the metal walkways.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open waterfront area with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow metal corridor toward the bright opening ahead

entered.detail: traditional red paper lantern hanging from corrugated metal structure
rusted corrugated metal sheets forming shanty walls
large industrial air conditioning unit mounted on metal framework
towering futuristic skyscrapers with neon advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow alleyway constructed from corrugated metal sheets. A red paper lantern hangs on the left as the camera moves forward toward a bright opening revealing the futuristic city skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront walkway with view of futuristic city skyline

events.description: emerges from enclosed alley into wide open waterfront area
slight turn to the right while passing large satellite dish structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated metal walkway with the city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: red elevated highway or monorail track crossing the waterfront
large white satellite dish mounted on a pole
abandoned rusted vehicle visible below the walkway in the dry grass
patch of dry brown grass and weeds growing between metal structures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront area with an expansive view of the futuristic city skyline across the water. The camera moves along an elevated metal walkway, passing a large satellite dish on the right and abandoned vehicles visible in the dry grass below.

scene_state.functional_zone: shanty town exterior walkway approaching residential structures

events.description: approaches and enters the doorway of a corrugated metal shack

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past a standing resident and approaching a building entrance

notable_agents.action: shirtless resident with tattoos standing on the walkway looking out toward the water

entered.detail: main corrugated metal building with rusted orange roof and multiple windows
stack of red and brown metal barrels beside the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the metal walkway past a standing NPC resident on the right. The path leads toward a large corrugated metal shack with a rusted roof, passing stacked barrels and other shanty structures before reaching the open doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dilapidated interior living space with large windows overlooking shanty town

events.description: moves from bright outdoor walkway into dimly lit interior of metal shack
approaches a suitcase on a mattress and interacts with it, triggering a loot prompt

agents.ego_description: enters the dark interior, looks around at the sparse furnishings, and examines items near the window

entered.detail: American flag with single star hanging on the interior wall
dirty mattress on the floor with a suitcase placed on it
large glass windows looking out onto the shanty town exterior
brown leather suitcase containing eurodollars placed on the mattress

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark interior of the metal shack, revealing a sparse living space with an American flag on the wall and mattresses on the floor. Sunlight streams through large windows overlooking the shanty town outside. The segment ends as the camera approaches a suitcase on a mattress and interacts with it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic metal alleyway into a wide waterfront vista before concluding inside a dim, sparse dwelling. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor of corrugated metal sheets past a red paper lantern, heading toward a bright opening that reveals a futuristic city skyline. As the camera emerges into the open air, the scene expands across an elevated metal walkway overlooking dry grass and abandoned vehicles, passing a large satellite dish and a local resident. The path then leads past stacked barrels and rusted shanty structures toward the open doorway of a large metal shack. Finally, the camera enters the dark interior, where sunlight streams through windows onto mattresses and an American flag, before coming to a stop at a suitcase on the floor.
